title: Insurance Company – Capital Resources Table
short_title: Insurance Company – Capital Resources Table (PRA Rule)

related_policy_statements.title: PS26/15 - "The prudential regime, and implementation of the Senior Insurance Managers Regime, for non-Solvency II firms"

rules.summary: Unless otherwise stated, this Part applies to a non-directive insurer other than a non-directive friendly society.
A firm must use the following table to calculate its capital resources pursuant to [Insurance Company – Capital Resources 2.1](/pra-rules/insurance-company---capital-resources#3f4476079ac14848812f

content_markdown:
1

###  Application

1.1

Unless otherwise stated, this Part applies to a _non-directive insurer_ other than a _non-directive friendly society_.

*Effective: 01/01/2016*

2

###  Capital Resources Table

2.1

A _firm_ must use the following table to calculate its _capital resources_ pursuant to [Insurance Company – Capital Resources 2.1](/pra-rules/insurance-company---capital-resources#3f4476079ac14848812fa620637cc38f "Insurance Company – Capital Resources 2.1"):

Total tier one capital after deductions = D - E

Type of capital| Related rules| Stage
---|---|---
Core tier one capital|  | A
_Permanent share capital_ | [Insurance Company – Capital Resources 5.1](/pra-rules/insurance-company---capital-resources#235efcc701444cee9b3bbfda1fcd5799 "Insurance Company – Capital Resources 5.1") |
Profit and loss account and other reserves (taking into account interim net losses) | [Insurance Company – Capital Resources 5.2](/pra-rules/insurance-company---capital-resources#d169c907042548818b050aa0f39787d0 "Insurance Company – Capital Resources 5.2") to [5.4](/pra-rules/insurance-company---capital-resources#31ea3c15691e49b98a389a71c178cccc "5.4") |
_Share_ premium account | [Insurance Company – Capital Resources 5.5](/pra-rules/insurance-company---capital-resources#e08de72318424068b3f47f4b86479e06 "Insurance Company – Capital Resources 5.5") to [5.6](/pra-rules/insurance-company---capital-resources#bdf179f4408949ed98e67c0ff9f26cf7 "5.6") |
Positive valuation differences | [Insurance Company – Capital Resources 5.7](/pra-rules/insurance-company---capital-resources#3a7cce73c907476996248eb7a7250374 "Insurance Company – Capital Resources 5.7") |
Fund for future appropriations | [Insurance Company – Capital Resources 5.13](/pra-rules/insurance-company---capital-resources#d1e692d3d8704427bf9bafca9578cb18 "Insurance Company – Capital Resources 5.13") |
Perpetual non-cumulative preference shares|  | B
Perpetual non-cumulative _preference shares_ | [Insurance Company – Capital Resources 6.1](/pra-rules/insurance-company---capital-resources#edec1eb6a36447dfbbdf5d9b9b040950 "Insurance Company – Capital Resources 6.1") |
Innovative tier one capital|  | C
Innovative tier one instruments | [Insurance Company – Capital Resources 6.2](/pra-rules/insurance-company---capital-resources#1f17738bb600482cb0c019a5397f868b "Insurance Company – Capital Resources 6.2") to [6.7](/pra-rules/insurance-company---capital-resources#6522a32c36d443f58674d3eb2a575ab5 "6.7") |
Total tier one capital before deductions = A + B + C|  | D
Deductions from tier one capital|  | E
Investments in own _shares_ | None |
Intangible assets | [Insurance Company – Capital Resources 8.1](/pra-rules/insurance-company---capital-resources#d5ee76755a2343e49dced7dd55e1325b "Insurance Company – Capital Resources 8.1") |
Amounts deducted from _technical provisions_ for discounting and other negative valuation differences | [Insurance Company – Capital Resources 5.7](/pra-rules/insurance-company---capital-resources#3a7cce73c907476996248eb7a7250374 "Insurance Company – Capital Resources 5.7") to [5.11](/pra-rules/insurance-company---capital-resources#6649119579e147e287c0026325db0710 "5.11") |
Total tier one capital after deductions = D- E|  | F
Upper tier two capital|  | G
Upper tier two capital  | [Insurance Company – Capital Resources 10](/pra-rules/insurance-company---capital-resources#be90e9e718ca4afdbff4933e5bb6b09c "Insurance Company – Capital Resources 10") |
Lower tier two capital|  | H
Lower tier two capital | [Insurance Company – Capital Resources 11 ](/pra-rules/insurance-company---capital-resources#c654117e554f42119ca2cb6b5ac5390d "Insurance Company – Capital Resources 11 ") |
Total tier two capital = G + H|  | I
Positive adjustments for affiliated companies|  | J
_Affiliated companies_ that have a _Part 4A permission_ (other than _insurance undertakings_) | [Insurance Company – Capital Resources 12.3](/pra-rules/insurance-company---capital-resources#78121ccf2245457986861f632e52058d "Insurance Company – Capital Resources 12.3") |
Total capital after positive adjustments for insurance undertakings but before deductions = F + I + J|  | K
Deductions from total capital|  | L
Inadmissible assets  | [Insurance Company – Capital Resources 12.1](/pra-rules/insurance-company---capital-resources#91ddf607eebe444b87a2e02ddcdf1a93 "Insurance Company – Capital Resources 12.1") and [13.1](/pra-rules/insurance-company---capital-resources#71314c54426b4f97b923d6fd940e101f "13.1") |
Assets in excess of _market risk _and _counterparty_ limits | [Insurance Company – Exposure Limits 7.2](/pra-rules/insurance-company---capital-resources#d71ea60d2f3b438da6047f37198d9633 "Insurance Company – Exposure Limits 7.2") to [7.4](/pra-rules/insurance-company---capital-resources#bcf120afc71e4445acfc4722abe7aa2f "7.4") |
_Affiliated companies_ that are _ancillary services undertakings_ | [Insurance Company – Capital Resources 12.2](/pra-rules/insurance-company---capital-resources#489daef31de84626895cbb246b891462 "Insurance Company – Capital Resources 12.2") |
Negative adjustments for _affiliated companies_ that have a _Part 4A permission_ (other than _insurance undertakings_) | [Insurance Company – Capital Resources 12.3](/pra-rules/insurance-company---capital-resources#78121ccf2245457986861f632e52058d "Insurance Company – Capital Resources 12.3") |
Total capital resources after deductions = K - L|  | M

*Effective: 01/01/2016*
content_html:
1

Application

1.1

Unless otherwise stated, this Part applies to a non-directive insurer other than a non-directive friendly society.

  • 01/01/2016

2

Capital Resources Table

2.1

A firm must use the following table to calculate its capital resources pursuant to Insurance Company – Capital Resources 2.1:

Total tier one capital after deductions = D - E

Type of capitalRelated rulesStage
Core tier one capital A
Permanent share capital Insurance Company – Capital Resources 5.1
Profit and loss account and other reserves (taking into account interim net losses) Insurance Company – Capital Resources 5.2 to 5.4
Share premium account Insurance Company – Capital Resources 5.5 to 5.6
Positive valuation differences Insurance Company – Capital Resources 5.7
Fund for future appropriations Insurance Company – Capital Resources 5.13
Perpetual non-cumulative preference shares B
Perpetual non-cumulative preference shares Insurance Company – Capital Resources 6.1
Innovative tier one capital C
Innovative tier one instruments Insurance Company – Capital Resources 6.2 to 6.7
Total tier one capital before deductions = A + B + C D
Deductions from tier one capital E
Investments in own shares None
Intangible assets Insurance Company – Capital Resources 8.1
Amounts deducted from technical provisions for discounting and other negative valuation differences Insurance Company – Capital Resources 5.7 to 5.11
Total tier one capital after deductions = D- E F
Upper tier two capital G
Upper tier two capital Insurance Company – Capital Resources 10
Lower tier two capital H
Lower tier two capital Insurance Company – Capital Resources 11
Total tier two capital = G + H I
Positive adjustments for affiliated companies J
Affiliated companies that have a Part 4A permission (other than insurance undertakings) Insurance Company – Capital Resources 12.3
Total capital after positive adjustments for insurance undertakings but before deductions = F + I + J K
Deductions from total capital L
Inadmissible assets Insurance Company – Capital Resources 12.1 and 13.1
Assets in excess of market risk and counterparty limits Insurance Company – Exposure Limits 7.2 to 7.4
Affiliated companies that are ancillary services undertakings Insurance Company – Capital Resources 12.2
Negative adjustments for affiliated companies that have a Part 4A permission (other than insurance undertakings) Insurance Company – Capital Resources 12.3
Total capital resources after deductions = K - L M
  • 01/01/2016
